description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2019 Porsche Cayenne, 3.0 TC V6, AWD, 335bhp, 8 Speed Auto. AED 139,000 or AED 2,179 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 122,501 KM's - Blackline Warranty (April 2026 Expiry) - Full Service History - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - 21” RS Spyder Design Wheels - Keyless Entry - Keyless Start - Lane Change Assist - Sport Chrono Package - Reverse Camera - Panoramic Roof - Auto Dimming Interior Mirror - Interior package in High Gloss Black - Wheel Arch Extension in Exterior Colour - Door Sill Guards in Brushed Aluminum - Navigation Module for Porsche Communication Management - Park Assist - LED Headlights incl. Porsche Dynamic Light System - 4-Zone Climate Controls - Voice control - Window Trim in High Gloss Silver
